channel.title: Junior to Senior Developer on simeononsecurity

image.title: Junior to Senior Developer on simeononsecurity

channel.description: Recent content in Junior to Senior Developer on simeononsecurity

item.title: Advancing from Junior to Senior Developer: Skills, Behaviors, and Timelines
item.category: "junior to senior developer" , "how to advance as a developer" , "software developer career growth" , "senior developer skills" , "developer promotion tips" , "software engineer advancement" , "growing as a developer" , "software development career playbook"
item.description: The concrete skills, behaviors, and mindset shifts that advance a developer from junior to mid-level to senior — and what actually drives promotions versus what developers mistakenly think matters.

item.title: Software Development Career Playbook: From First Commit to Engineering Lead
item.category: "software development career" , "software engineering" , "career playbook" , "programming" , "developer career" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and leading a software development career. Covers programming languages, education paths, job searching, career advancement, and engineering leadership.

item.title: What Does a Software Developer Career Path Look Like?
item.category: "software developer career path" , "junior to senior developer" , "software engineer levels" , "developer career progression" , "staff engineer" , "principal engineer" , "engineering manager career path" , "software engineering levels" , "developer career roadmap"
item.description: Understand the typical software developer career progression from junior developer to senior, staff, principal engineer, or engineering manager, including what skills and timelines to expect at each level.

item.title: Growing as a Software Developer
item.category: "software developer career growth" , "junior to senior developer" , "open source contributions" , "system design" , "software engineering advancement" , "developer career track"
item.description: How to advance from junior to senior developer, choose your technical track, contribute to open source, and develop system design skills.
